column1: # Custom 8MB partition table for Nimbus (Adafruit MatrixPortal ESP32-S3
# Based on the board's stock partitions-8MB-tinyuf2.csv
# slots (ota_0 + ota_1) are merged into a single 4MB app partition so the
# firmware fits: the WS4 40x30 logo blob grew the image to ~2.16MB
# stock 2MB app slot. OTA is dropped (this display is flashed over USB
# over-the-air). The TinyUF2 `uf2` factory partition and the `ffat` filesystem
# are kept at their EXACT original offsets/sizes so UF2 drag-drop flashing and
# the USB mass-storage drive still work.
